NetSparkleUpdater.​Events.​UpdateDetectedEventArgs
EventArgs
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​Events.​UpdateDetectedEventArgs

Contains all information for the update detected event

Properties
NextAction
public NextUpdateAction NextAction {
get;
set
}

The next action to execute after the app user decides how to handle an update

ApplicationConfig
public Configuration ApplicationConfig {
get;
set
}

The application configuration (stores data on last time updates were checked, etc.)

LatestVersion
public AppCastItem LatestVersion {
get;
set
}

The latest available version in the app cast

AppCastItems
public List<AppCastItem> AppCastItems {
get;
set
}

All app cast items that were sent in the appcast

Functions
UpdateDetectedEventArgs
public UpdateDetectedEventArgs(
NextUpdateAction 
action,
Configuration 
config,
AppCastItem 
item,
List<AppCastItem> 
items
)

Basic constructor for UpdateDetectedEventArgs

Parameters
action
NextUpdateAction

Next update action for this update (e.g. show UI, perform unattended)

config
Configuration

for the current application

item
AppCastItem

that represents an update for the user

items
List<AppCastItem>

All  objects available.
